breaking.title_zh: 四大科技巨头财报出炉：谷歌云大增63%，Meta上调AI开支至1450亿美元
breaking.title_en: Big Tech Earnings: Google Cloud +63%, Meta Raises AI Capex to $145B
breaking.summary_zh: 谷歌、Meta、亚马逊、微软同日发布Q1财报。谷歌营收超预期增长22%，云业务大增63%，上调全年资本开支至1800-1900亿美元。Meta营收增长33%，但盘后跌近7%因AI投资担忧。
breaking.summary_en: Google, Meta, Amazon, Microsoft report Q1 earnings. Google revenue up 22% with Cloud +63%, raising full-year capex to $180-190B. Meta revenue up 33% but falls 7% after hours on AI spending concerns.

breaking.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼庭审首日：'没有我就没有OpenAI'
breaking.title_en: Musk vs Altman Trial Day 1: 'No OpenAI Without Me'
breaking.summary_zh: 马斯克作为首位出庭证人，向陪审团解释创办OpenAI非营利的初衷，要求奥特曼和布罗克曼离职，将'不当得利'归还慈善机构。奥特曼到庭旁听。
breaking.summary_en: Musk takes the stand as first witness, explaining why OpenAI was founded as non-profit. Demands Altman and Brockman step down, return 'ill-gotten gains' to charity. Altman attends court.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic拟按超9000亿美元估值融资，白宫拟绕过禁令让其'回来'
daily.title_en: Anthropic Weighs $900B+ Valuation Round, White House Eyes Bypassing Ban
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic正在权衡新一轮融资，估值或超9000亿美元。与此同时，白宫拟起草行政指令绕开五角大楼禁令，为联邦机构接入其旗舰模型Mythos铺路——因其展现出识别网络漏洞的罕见能力。
daily.excerpt_en: Anthropic weighs new funding round at $900B+ valuation. White House reportedly drafting executive order to bypass Pentagon blacklist, paving way for federal agencies to access Mythos model due to its rare network vulnerability detection capabilities.

daily.title_zh: 亚马逊AWS上线OpenAI模型，AWS收入增速创近两年最高
daily.title_en: AWS Launches OpenAI Models, Cloud Growth Hits 2-Year High
daily.excerpt_zh: 亚马逊Q1财报中AWS表现亮眼，收入增速为近两年最高。AWS云平台正式上线OpenAI模型服务，企业可在AWS上构建生产级AI代理。
daily.excerpt_en: Amazon Q1 earnings show AWS at fastest growth rate in two years. AWS cloud platform officially launches OpenAI model services, enabling enterprises to build production AI agents on AWS.

daily.title_zh: 高通Q2手机芯片跌13%，数据中心业务成新救命稻草
daily.title_en: Qualcomm Q2 Phone Chips Down 13%, Data Center Becomes New Lifeline
daily.excerpt_zh: 高通Q2手机芯片收入下跌13%，但CEO称'已看到底部'。数据中心芯片业务成为新增长点，盘后股价先跌后涨逾10%。
daily.excerpt_en: Qualcomm Q2 phone chip revenue down 13%, but CEO says 'seeing the bottom'. Data center chip business emerges as new growth driver, stock surges 10%+ after hours.

daily.title_zh: OpenAI未达增长预期引发AI概念股全线大跌
daily.title_en: OpenAI Misses Growth Targets, AI Stocks Tumble Across Board
daily.excerpt_zh: 报道称OpenAI营收与用户增长均未达内部预期，引发AI基建股集体下跌。甲骨文跌4.1%、CoreWeave跌5.8%、AMD跌3.4%、英伟达跌1.6%，创近一个月最差单日表现。
daily.excerpt_en: Reports that OpenAI missed revenue and user growth targets trigger broad AI infrastructure selloff. Oracle -4.1%, CoreWeave -5.8%, AMD -3.4%, NVIDIA -1.6% — worst single-day performance in a month.

daily.title_zh: 23岁业余爱好者用ChatGPT攻克60年数学猜想Erdős #1196
daily.title_en: 23-Year-Old Amateur Cracks 60-Year Erdős #1196 Math Conjecture with ChatGPT
daily.excerpt_zh: 一位没有系统高等数学训练的年轻人，利用ChatGPT在80分钟内解出了困扰数学界60年的Erdős #1196问题。这是AI辅助人类突破知识边界的最新案例。
daily.excerpt_en: A young person without formal higher math training used ChatGPT to solve the 60-year-old Erdős #1196 problem in 80 minutes. Latest case of AI-assisted human breakthrough at knowledge boundaries.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic今日正式关闭Claude 1M上下文Beta，开发者需迁移至新模型
daily.title_en: Anthropic Retires Claude 1M Context Beta Today, Developers Must Migrate
daily.excerpt_zh: 4月30日起，Anthropic正式关闭Sonnet 4和Sonnet 4.5的1M上下文Beta。超长文本处理需迁移至Sonnet 4.6或Opus 4.6，1M上下文现已作为标准功能免费提供。
daily.excerpt_en: Starting April 30, Anthropic officially retires the 1M context beta on Sonnet 4 and 4.5. Long-context processing must migrate to Sonnet 4.6 or Opus 4.6, where 1M tokens are now standard at no premium.

daily.title_zh: 四大巨头2026年AI资本支出合计超6000亿美元，投资回报引质疑
daily.title_en: Big Four Tech Giants' 2026 AI Capex Tops $600B, ROI Questioned
daily.excerpt_zh: 谷歌、Meta、微软、亚马逊2026年计划在AI基础设施上合计投入超6000亿美元。摩根士丹利判断，AI投资的第一信号是营收加速而非支出规模本身。
daily.excerpt_en: Google, Meta, Microsoft, Amazon plan combined $600B+ in AI infrastructure for 2026. Morgan Stanley says first signal of AI ROI is revenue acceleration, not capex scale itself.

daily.title_zh: Meta推出'模型能力倡议'：捕捉员工鼠标点击和键盘输入训练AI
daily.title_en: Meta's 'Model Capability Initiative' Captures Employee Inputs to Train AI
daily.excerpt_zh: Meta向员工发布通知，推出MCI计划，将捕捉员工鼠标点击、键盘输入和屏幕内容上下文用于训练AI智能体。员工工作行为数据正式成为AI训练语料。
daily.excerpt_en: Meta launches MCI initiative, capturing employee mouse clicks, keyboard inputs, and screen context to train AI agents. Employee work behavior data now becomes AI training corpus.
